query:
SELECT 'users' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'stories', COUNT(*) FROM stories
UNION ALL SELECT 'documents_total', COUNT(*) FROM documents
UNION ALL SELECT 'documents_public', COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE public_status = true
UNION ALL SELECT 'documents_state', COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE case_tag = 'state'
UNION ALL SELECT 'documents_federal', COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE case_tag = 'federal'
UNION ALL SELECT 'timeline_events', COUNT(*) FROM timeline_events
UNION ALL SELECT 'actors', COUNT(*) FROM actors
UNION ALL SELECT 'prrs', COUNT(*) FROM public_records_requests
UNION ALL SELECT 'agencies', COUNT(*) FROM agencies
UNION ALL SELECT 'violation_tags', COUNT(*) FROM violation_tags
UNION ALL SELECT 'ingest_jobs', COUNT(*) FROM ingest_jobs
UNION ALL SELECT 'audit_log', COUNT(*) FROM audit_log
UNION ALL SELECT 'review_requests', COUNT(*) FROM review_requests
UNION ALL SELECT 'contributor_xp', COUNT(*) FROM contributor_xp
UNION ALL SELECT 'badge_definitions', COUNT(*) FROM badge_definitions;
